name: iso42001.testConfig
label: ISO 42001 Test Configuration
description: Defines an ISO 42001 test configuration including endpoints, parameters, and test selection.

fields.name: moduleId
fields.description: Test module identifier (BIAS, DATA, TRANS, OVER, MON, THRD)

fields.name: testIds
fields.description: Specific test IDs to run (empty = all in module)

fields.name: endpointName
fields.description: LLM endpoint name from chat config

fields.name: endpointType
fields.description: Endpoint type: openai, anthropic, ollama, azure

fields.name: chatConfigName
fields.description: Name of olio.llm.chatConfig to use for LLM calls

fields.name: promptConfigName
fields.description: Name of olio.llm.promptConfig template for Tier 1 system prompts
